Custom Bulk Stickers

Order High-Quality Custom Stickers in Bulk for Business Branding & Product Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Custom Bulk Stickers - Design Your Order Choose Size & Quantity Upload Artwork or Design Online Select Cut Options (Die-Cut or Kiss-Cut) Choose Production Speed (1-5 Business Days) Review & Place Order Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Bulk Stickers for Business & Marketing

Our custom bulk stickers provide an affordable and effective solution for product packaging, branding campaigns, and promotional materials. Whether you need hundreds or thousands of stickers, our bulk printing services deliver professional-quality vinyl stickers with volume discounts that make large orders cost-effective for businesses of all sizes. See also [rectangle label sheets](https://www.decals.com/labels/label-sheets/rectangle-label-sheets).

Bulk stickers are perfect for product labeling, marketing giveaways, event promotions, and brand awareness campaigns. Available in multiple sizes, shapes, and materials, our custom bulk stickers feature vibrant colors and durable vinyl construction that withstands both indoor and outdoor applications.

Our streamlined bulk ordering process includes online design tools, professional artwork support, and flexible production timelines to meet your specific project needs. From brewery stickers for product packaging to promotional stickers for marketing events, we handle bulk orders with the same attention to detail as individual custom orders.

Each bulk sticker order includes free digital proofing, live order tracking, and quality assurance testing to ensure your custom stickers meet professional standards. With production capabilities ranging from same-day rush orders to standard 5-day turnaround, we accommodate urgent promotional campaigns and planned marketing initiatives.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Bulk Stickers

Ordering custom bulk stickers through our streamlined process ensures professional results and timely delivery for your business needs. Our bulk sticker ordering system accommodates both simple logo applications and complex design requirements with the same level of quality control and customer support.

Design Process

Create your bulk sticker design using our online design tool or upload your own print-ready artwork files. Our design interface supports logo uploads, text customization, and shape selection for bulk sticker projects. For complex bulk orders, our design team can assist with artwork preparation and file optimization to ensure consistent printing quality across large quantities.

Upload high-resolution artwork files in EPS, PDF, or other vector formats for best bulk printing results. Our prepress team reviews all bulk sticker artwork to verify print quality and cutting specifications before production begins.

Payment

All bulk sticker orders require full payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted for bulk orders, though payment must be received and processed before your bulk stickers enter production.

Volume pricing automatically applies to bulk sticker orders, with greater discounts available for larger quantities. Final pricing appears during checkout and includes all applicable bulk discounts for your custom sticker order.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your bulk sticker order progress through every production stage with our Live Order Tracking system. After placing your bulk order, you'll receive a unique tracking number that provides real-time updates from artwork approval through final shipping and delivery.

Our tracking system sends automated notifications for key milestones including artwork approval, production start, quality control completion, and shipping dispatch. This visibility ensures you stay informed about your bulk sticker delivery timeline throughout the entire process.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bulk Sticker Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production timelines for bulk stickers range from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the turnaround speed that best fits your project deadline and budget. Production time begins after artwork approval and payment processing, ensuring your bulk stickers meet quality standards before shipping.

All bulk sticker production times are separate from shipping duration. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available for urgent bulk sticker needs - contact our customer service team to discuss expedited options.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Priority production delivers bulk stickers within one business day for time-sensitive promotional campaigns and urgent business needs. This expedited service ensures your custom bulk stickers are produced and ready to ship within 24 hours of artwork approval and payment processing.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides a fast turnaround for bulk stickers when you need professional results quickly but have slightly more flexibility than priority timing. This option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most bulk sticker projects.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Standard production is our most popular option for bulk stickers, offering reliable timing at no additional cost. This turnaround provides ample time for quality control while meeting most business scheduling requirements for promotional materials and product packaging.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Saver production offers the most economical option for bulk stickers when timing allows for extended production. Choose this option for planned campaigns and non-urgent bulk orders to maximize cost savings on large sticker quantities.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut vs Kiss-Cut Bulk Stickers

Understanding the differences between die-cut and kiss-cut options helps you choose the best cutting method for your bulk sticker application. Both cutting styles work effectively for bulk orders, with the choice depending on your intended use and application preferences.

The primary difference between these cutting methods relates to the paper backing and how your bulk stickers separate from the carrier sheet. For detailed information about cutting methods, visit our helpful blog article comparing die-cut vs kiss-cut applications.

Die-Cut Bulk Stickers

Die-cut bulk stickers are cut completely through both the vinyl material and paper backing, creating individually separated stickers with no excess material around the design. This cutting method works like a cookie cutter, producing bulk stickers that match the exact contour of your design for clean, professional appearance.

Die-cut bulk stickers are ideal for applications where you want individually handled pieces without paper backing. This cutting style works well for product packaging, promotional giveaways, and applications where stickers will be applied one at a time.

Kiss-Cut Bulk Stickers

Kiss-cut bulk stickers are cut only through the vinyl layer, leaving the paper backing intact around each sticker. This cutting method creates bulk stickers with a paper border that makes peeling and application easier, especially for high-volume application projects.

Kiss-cut bulk stickers remain on a carrier sheet, making them convenient for organized storage and sequential application. This cutting style works well for bulk stickers used in production environments or when you need to maintain organization during application.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Bulk Sticker Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures consistent quality across your entire bulk sticker order. Our artwork requirements are designed to optimize printing results for large quantities while maintaining color accuracy and design detail throughout your bulk production run.

High-resolution artwork files produce the best results for bulk sticker printing, as design quality directly impacts the appearance of hundreds or thousands of finished stickers. Our prepress team reviews all bulk sticker artwork before production to ensure optimal printing results.

Preferred File Types

Vector-based files provide the best results for bulk sticker printing due to their scalability and print quality consistency. Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) and PDF formats are our preferred file types for bulk orders, as they maintain design integrity across large production runs.

When submitting vector files for bulk stickers, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during production. Maximum file size for bulk sticker artwork is 100 MB per design.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files are acceptable for bulk sticker printing when vector artwork is not available. JPG, TIFF, and PNG formats work for bulk orders provided they meet our resolution requirements for quality printing results.

Raster files for bulk stickers should be created at 300 DPI minimum at the actual printed size to ensure sharp detail reproduction across your entire bulk order.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up artwork files at the exact size you're ordering for bulk stickers to ensure accurate scaling and proportions. Convert all text to outlines and provide clear cut line indications for die-cut bulk stickers to ensure consistent cutting across large production runs.

Include bleed areas only when necessary and avoid flattening layers in PSD files. Clear cut line specifications are essential for bulk sticker orders to ensure uniformity across all produced pieces.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bulk Sticker Shipping & Delivery Options

Our shipping options for bulk stickers accommodate various delivery timelines and budget requirements. Bulk orders typically require sturdy packaging to protect large quantities during transit, and we provide appropriate packaging materials to ensure your custom stickers arrive in perfect condition.

Shipping time is separate from production time for bulk stickers. Your total delivery timeline includes both production duration and shipping time to your specified delivery address.

Shipping Methods

Standard ground shipping provides cost-effective delivery for most bulk sticker orders, typically arriving within 3-7 business days depending on your location. Express shipping options are available for bulk stickers when you need faster delivery to meet tight promotional deadlines.

Expedited shipping services include overnight and 2-day delivery options for urgent bulk sticker needs. These services work well when combined with priority production to minimize total delivery time for time-sensitive campaigns.

Shipping Time Expectations

Ground shipping for bulk stickers typically requires 3-7 business days for delivery, while expedited options range from overnight to 2 business days. Actual shipping time depends on your delivery location and selected shipping service level.

International shipping is available for bulk sticker orders with extended delivery timeframes and additional customs processing requirements. Contact our customer service team for international bulk shipping quotes and delivery estimates.

Important Shipping Notes

Bulk sticker orders require careful packaging due to quantity and weight considerations. We use protective materials and appropriate box sizing to prevent damage during transit while keeping shipping costs reasonable for large orders.

Tracking information is provided for all bulk sticker shipments, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and coordinate receipt of your order. Signature confirmation may be required for high-value bulk orders to ensure secure delivery.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installation Guide for Bulk Stickers

Proper application techniques ensure consistent results when installing large quantities of custom stickers. Whether you're applying bulk stickers to products, promotional materials, or other surfaces, following proper installation procedures helps achieve professional appearance and maximum adhesion.

Bulk sticker installation often involves repetitive application processes, making efficient techniques and surface preparation especially important for maintaining quality across large quantities. Our installation guidelines help streamline bulk application while ensuring each sticker adheres properly.

Preparing the Surface

Clean all surfaces thoroughly before applying bulk stickers, removing dust, oils, and residue that could prevent proper adhesion. Use mild detergent and water for most surfaces, followed by alcohol wiping for optimal cleanliness on glass and metal applications.

Allow surfaces to dry completely before beginning bulk sticker application. Consistent surface preparation across all application sites ensures uniform adhesion and appearance throughout your bulk installation project.

Applying the Bulk Stickers

Remove stickers from backing material carefully to avoid stretching or damaging the adhesive. For die-cut bulk stickers, handle individual pieces by the edges to prevent fingerprints on the adhesive surface.

Position each sticker accurately before making contact with the surface, as repositioning can reduce adhesive effectiveness. Apply firm, even pressure across the entire sticker surface to ensure complete adhesion and eliminate air bubbles.

Removing Transfer Tape

For bulk stickers with transfer tape, remove the tape slowly at a 45-degree angle after confirming the sticker has adhered to the surface. If any portion of the sticker lifts with the transfer tape, press it back down and continue removal more slowly.

Check each completed application before moving to the next sticker, ensuring consistent quality throughout your bulk installation project. This attention to detail maintains professional standards across large-quantity applications.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Bulk Stickers?

Bulk stickers are custom-printed vinyl adhesive products manufactured in large quantities for business applications, promotional campaigns, and product packaging needs. These stickers are typically ordered in quantities of hundreds or thousands, offering significant cost savings compared to small-batch custom sticker orders. Bulk stickers are commonly made from durable vinyl materials with permanent or removable adhesive backing, designed for both indoor and outdoor applications depending on the specific material and adhesive combination selected.

Design Your Custom Bulk Stickers Today

Transform your marketing campaigns and product packaging with professional custom bulk stickers that deliver consistent branding across all your promotional materials. Our bulk sticker printing services combine competitive volume pricing with the same quality standards and customer support that make individual custom orders successful.

Start your bulk sticker project by selecting your preferred size, quantity, and cutting options using our online configurator. Upload your artwork or create a custom design using our online tools, then choose the production timeline that meets your campaign schedule. With options ranging from same-day priority production to cost-saving 5-day turnaround, we accommodate both urgent promotional needs and planned marketing initiatives.

Our bulk sticker capabilities include die-cut and kiss-cut options, multiple vinyl materials, and professional color printing that maintains consistency across large production runs. Whether you need product labels, promotional giveaways, or branded merchandise, our bulk printing services deliver professional results at quantities and prices that support your business objectives.

Ready to place your bulk sticker order? Use our online design tools to create your custom stickers, or contact our customer service team for assistance with large-quantity projects and specialized requirements. With fast production, reliable shipping, and comprehensive order tracking, we make bulk sticker printing straightforward and dependable for businesses of all sizes.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bulk Sticker FAQs

What materials are bulk stickers made from?

Bulk stickers are primarily made from high-quality vinyl materials that provide durability and weather resistance for both indoor and outdoor applications. Our standard vinyl offers excellent adhesion and color retention, while premium vinyl options provide enhanced UV resistance and longer lifespan for outdoor bulk sticker applications.

What surfaces work best for bulk stickers?

Bulk stickers adhere effectively to clean, smooth surfaces including glass, metal, plastic, and painted surfaces. For best results with bulk applications, ensure all surfaces are free from dust, oils, and residue before applying your custom stickers. Textured or highly curved surfaces may require special consideration for optimal adhesion.

How much can I save by ordering stickers in bulk?

Bulk sticker orders provide significant cost savings through volume pricing, with larger quantities offering proportionally greater discounts per sticker. The more you order, the lower your per-unit cost becomes, making bulk orders ideal for businesses needing hundreds or thousands of custom stickers for ongoing promotional or packaging needs.

What file format works best for bulk sticker artwork?

Vector-based files in Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF format produce the best results for bulk sticker printing due to their scalability and print quality consistency. These file types ensure your design maintains sharp details and accurate colors across large production runs of hundreds or thousands of stickers.

Can I get samples before placing a large bulk order?

Yes, we offer sample stickers to help you evaluate material quality, colors, and adhesion before committing to large bulk quantities. Request custom samples to test your specific design and material combination on your intended application surfaces.

What's the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut for bulk orders?

Die-cut bulk stickers are cut completely through both vinyl and backing, creating individual stickers ready for immediate application. Kiss-cut bulk stickers are cut only through the vinyl layer, leaving stickers on a backing sheet that makes handling and sequential application easier for large-quantity projects.

How long do bulk stickers last outdoors?

Quality vinyl bulk stickers typically last 3-5 years outdoors when applied to clean, smooth surfaces like glass or metal. Actual lifespan depends on environmental conditions, surface preparation, and application quality, with premium materials offering extended durability for demanding outdoor applications.

What's the minimum quantity for bulk sticker orders?

While we don't have a strict minimum quantity requirement, bulk pricing advantages typically become meaningful for orders of 100 or more stickers. Our volume discounts increase with larger quantities, making orders of 500, 1000, or more stickers increasingly cost-effective per unit.
